product_overview: SIPREMS is a smart inventory prediction and POS-integrated management system that helps small retailers avoid stockouts and overstocks by combining transactional data, calendar events, and ML-driven forecasts. It provides product and event management, atomic transactions, aggregated dashboards, and an AI assistant for operational insights.
core_goals: Ensure atomic, auditable POS transactions that reliably decrement stock and produce historical records
Provide CRUD product management with category and stock-level filtering
Support calendar event management that can be used to calibrate forecasting
Deliver aggregated dashboard metrics and chart data for business monitoring
Offer accurate product demand forecasting and automated restock recommendations
Expose an authenticated AI assistant for natural-language business queries with rate-limiting and security

features.name: Transactions API
features.description: Create and list store transactions atomically; ensure stock is updated and historical transaction data is available for forecasting.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/transactions with cart items, payment details and store_id -> Receive 201 with transaction_id -> GET /api/v1/transactions?store_id={store_id}&limit=20 -> Receive 200 with transactions list including transaction_id

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/transactions with invalid payment details (mismatched totals) -> Receive 400 with validation error -> GET /api/v1/transactions?store_id={store_id}&limit=20 -> Receive 200 with transactions list not containing the failed transaction

features.name: Products API
features.description: Manage product catalog: create, read, update, delete products and filter by category or stock thresholds for restock workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/products with product payload (name, sku, price, stock, category) and store_id -> Receive 201 with product_id -> GET /api/v1/products/{product_id} -> Receive 200 with created product details
POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> PATCH /api/v1/products/{nonexistent_product_id} with update payload -> Receive 404 not found
GET /api/v1/products?category=beverages&stock_lt=10 -> Receive 200 with filtered product list matching category and low-stock criteria

features.name: Events API
features.description: Create and list calendar events (promotions, holidays) that influence forecasting; support event calibration to adjust ML impact.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/events with event payload (title, start_date, end_date, type, store_id) -> Receive 201 with event_id -> GET /api/v1/events?store_id={store_id} -> Receive 200 with list including event_id
POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/events with missing required fields (e.g., no start_date) -> Receive 400 validation error

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/events/{event_id}/calibrate with calibration parameters (impact_multiplier) -> Receive 200 with calibration status -> GET /api/v1/events?store_id={store_id} -> Receive 200 showing calibrated flag for event

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/events/{nonexistent_event_id}/calibrate with calibration parameters -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Dashboard API
features.description: Provide aggregated sales and performance metrics and time-series chart data to monitor store health and support decisions.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> GET /api/v1/dashboard/metrics?store_id={store_id}&start=2026-01-01&end=2026-01-31 -> Receive 200 with aggregated metrics (sales, avg_ticket, top_products)

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> GET /api/v1/dashboard/sales-chart?store_id={store_id}&start=2026-01-01&end=2026-01-31 -> Receive 200 with time-series sales chart data
GET /api/v1/dashboard/sales-chart?start=2026-02-30&end=2026-02-31 -> Receive 400 with invalid date range error

features.name: Forecasting API (ML Integration)
features.description: Train forecasting models and retrieve product demand forecasts (e.g., 30-day predictions) used for automated restock recommendations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/forecast/train with payload {product_ids, start_date, end_date, store_id} -> Receive 202 Accepted with job_id -> GET /api/v1/forecast/{product_id}?days=30&store_id={store_id} -> Receive 200 with prediction series and confidence bands

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and store_id -> POST /api/v1/forecast/train with insufficient history data -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with error indicating insufficient data -> GET /api/v1/forecast/{product_id}?days=30&store_id={store_id} -> Receive 404 or 204 indicating no forecast available

features.name: AI Assistant (Chatbot)
features.description: Authenticated natural-language assistant (backed by Gemini) that answers business queries, summarizes trends, and provides restock recommendations with per-user rate limits.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and rate_limit_info -> POST /api/v1/assistant/query with query 'Which products should I restock next week for store {store_id}?' and store_id -> Receive 200 with assistant response containing ranked recommendations and rationale

POST /api/v1/auth/verify-token with Firebase ID token -> Receive 200 with user and rate_limit_info -> POST /api/v1/assistant/query exceeding allowed requests in window -> Receive 429 rate limit exceeded with retry-after header

features.name: Transactions API
features.description: Handles transaction creation (atomic), listing, and historical data.

features.name: Products API
features.description: Product management including CRUD operations and stock/category filtering.

features.name: Events API
features.description: Calendar event management for promotions and holidays.

features.name: Dashboard API
features.description: Aggregated sales metrics and chart data.
